name: March 2026 Strike Wave on IRGC/Basij/SNSC Leadership
description: A sustained US-Israel strike campaign from 2–31 March 2026 (with operations extending to early April) that killed 30+ named officials across the [Basij](/orgs/basij), [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) regional commands, [IRGC Quds Force Lebanon Corps](/orgs/irgc-quds-force-lebanon-corps), Ministry of Intelligence, and the [Supreme National Security Council](/orgs/supreme-national-security-council). The wave followed the February 2026 Israeli strikes that killed [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) and began a systematic campaign to eliminate Iran's reconstituted military leadership. The most strategically significant single strike occurred on 17 March 2026, targeting the SNSC compound: it killed [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani), his son [Morteza Larijani](/people/morteza-larijani), SNSC Deputy Secretary [Ali Bateni](/people/ali-bateni), and SNSC Deputy for Internal Security [Alireza Bayat](/people/alireza-bayat). Other senior casualties included Basij head [Asadollah Badfar](/people/asadollah-badfar), Khatam al-Anbiya Staff Chief [Abolqasem Babaeian](/people/abolqasem-babaeian), and multiple IRGC provincial and Aerospace Force commanders.

sources.title: Dozens of Senior IRGC and SNSC Officials Killed in March 2026 Strikes
Iran's wartime leader isn't a dealmaker

editorial_notes: Covers strikes from 2 March through early April 2026. The 17 March SNSC strike (Ali Larijani, Bayat, Morteza Larijani, Bateni) is the most significant sub-event. See also larijani-assassination-2026 for the Larijani-specific entry.
